title: Design MAP session replay read model
description: Follow-up from TASK-171: design a MAP-native, local-only event/session replay read model for mission-control and Command Center use, derived from canonical task/events/hcom sources without adding new write authority.
acceptance_criteria: Design identifies canonical input sources, derived indexes, and drift checks without changing source authority.
Design defines read-only query surfaces for trace/task/agent/session filters useful to mission-control or Command Center.
Design specifies privacy/scope boundaries and rejects direct adoption of external Agents Observe code or services.
Design recommends concrete implementation tasks or states why implementation should wait.
